expectedWindow: PTU now (Wave 1 since ~26 Jun); Live target ~ July/Aug 2026 (tentative)
summary: Alpha 4.9 is now on the PTU (Wave 1 testing since late June 2026) — not yet on Live. It centers on a new Instancing system debuting with the reworked return of Siege of Orison, an Item Recovery upgrade, and a wave of FPS combat gear. Deeper systems (new flight model, hacking, crafting overhaul, social tools) are in development for 4.9 and beyond. All items are CIG roadmap/PTU entries and may shift before Live.

highlights.name: Instancing
highlights.desc: A new instancing system that creates controlled mission spaces — other groups can no longer interfere with your run. Debuts with Siege of Orison.

highlights.name: Siege of Orison — Return
highlights.desc: The large-scale FPS operation returns, this time as an instanced encounter for a clean start-to-finish run.

highlights.name: Item Recovery (Tier 1)
highlights.desc: Expanded recovery: timed claims, optional expedite fees, freight-elevator item claims, and free recovery when losses happen outside your control (bugs).

highlights.name: New Flight Model
highlights.desc: A reworked flight model is in development for 4.9.

highlights.name: Crafting Overhaul
highlights.desc: A revamp of the crafting systems is in development.

highlights.name: Super Heavy Combat Armor
highlights.desc: Heaviest ground-combat armor tier, unlocking exclusive heavy weapons — shifts boarding and bunker-clear meta toward specialized roles.

highlights.name: Apocalypse Arms "Vendetta" HMG
highlights.desc: New heavy machine gun with the punch needed to crack the new armor tiers.

highlights.name: Behring CQ27 Bullpup Rifle
highlights.desc: New bullpup rifle joining the FPS arsenal.

highlights.name: Drake Clipper
highlights.desc: New ship added as a contract reward in Wikelo's Emporium.

highlights.name: More Wikelo Ships
highlights.desc: Additional ships coming to Wikelo's Emporium contract rewards.

highlights.name: Recco Battaglia Returns
highlights.desc: NPC Recco Battaglia returns to the Persistent Universe to hand out missions again.
